⚠️ Defaulter & Delay Tracker

IFRAP: Paisa withdraw kiya lekin kaam abhi tak verify nahi hua · CPI: Bohot pehle approve hui lekin abhi tak complete nahi

💡 Kaise kaam karta hai: "IFRAP Defaulter" = jis ne Stage ka paisa withdraw (Yes) kiya hai magar us stage ka kaam verified (No) hai. "CPI Delay" = jo scheme 12+ mahine pehle approve hui aur abhi bhi ongoing hai. Har list Excel/CSV download ho sakti hai aur WhatsApp pe share bhi ho sakti hai.

📷 Photo Gallery — Project Field Documentation

Sab projects ka field documentation · Google Sheet mein "Photo Register" sheet ke Column H (Photo URL) mein link paste karein → yahan auto-show hogi

💡 Kaise use karein: Google Sheet → "📷 Photo Register" tab kholein → Photo URL column mein Google Drive/Google Photos/koi bhi direct image URL paste karein → Dashboard refresh karein → photo yahan aa jaye gi. Google Drive tip: Right-click photo → Share → "Anyone with link" → copy link paste karein (system khud format convert kar lega).
